data.title: Microservices
data.description: Spotify uses a microservices architecture allowing independent deployment of services.
data.technical_spec: Distributed system with APIs for communication between services.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: To ensure fast and reliable music streaming services, Spotify utilizes CDNs globally.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of CDNs like Akamai for caching content.

data.title: Data Streaming
data.description: Real-time data streaming capabilities to handle music playback and analytics.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka for real-time data feed management.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Spotify operates mainly in the cloud for scalability and reliability.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Combination of SQL and NoSQL databases for storing user data and metadata.
